name: auto-compress
description: Automatically compresses old conversation history into narrative summaries when context window usage approaches the limit. Works alongside the memory plugin.

settings.label: Compression Threshold
settings.description: Trigger compression when context usage exceeds this ratio (0.0 - 1.0)

zh.label: 压缩触发阈值
zh.description: 当上下文使用量超过此比例时触发自动压缩 (0.0 - 1.0)

settings.label: Keep Recent Messages
settings.description: Number of recent messages to keep after compression

zh.label: 保留近期消息数
zh.description: 压缩后保留的最近消息数量

en.name: Auto Compress
en.description: Automatically compresses old conversation history into narrative summaries when approaching context limits.

zh.name: 自动压缩
zh.description: 当对话接近上下文窗口上限时，自动将旧对话压缩为叙事摘要。
